markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Close GAP-ED-005 + ED-CODE-INT-001..005 + ED-CODE-INT-009: wire the BUILT backend code index (knowledge_code_nav symbols/references/file-lens, staleness verdicts from MT-106) into embedded Monaco as real providers: completion, hover (symbol info + doc passages), go-to-definition/references (in-app navigation), diagnostics/problems surface, document formatting, minimap + sticky scroll + inlay hints enablement. Staleness verdicts must surface on served intel (never silently stale). This is the single biggest VS Code-parity lever; backend exists, only the bridge is missing.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.
Bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries only (Tiptap/Monaco precedent); no CDN; no external app launches as product behavior.
PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; UI artifacts are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle (v02.193), product code, tests, and receipts.

OPERATOR ORDER (DEC-007, 2026-06-12): NO scaffolding, templates, mock-ups, or vibecoding; every feature must be working AND tested in runtime (executed vitest/Playwright/real-PG proof per feature, not status text). A feature without an executed runtime proof is NOT done.
Providers consume the real /knowledge/code/* routes; no fake/static suggestion lists.
Stale code-intel results carry the staleness verdict into the UI.
scope.expected_behavior: Typing in an embedded code block gives real completions/hover/def/refs/diagnostics backed by the project's own code index.
acceptance_criteria: Each provider runtime-proven against the real backend on a real indexed file (Playwright + API integration).
Go-to-def navigates in-app to the target file lens.
Staleness badge proven on a stale fixture.
Adversarial self-review recorded per the WP loop; findings fixed before evidence write.
verification: cargo test -p handshake_core --features runtime-full,test-utils (scoped) green with real-PG tests for backend state.
pnpm vitest run green; tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean.
Offline Playwright runtime proof for each named capability (zero external network requests).
handoff_requirements: List files changed, tests run with exact names/counts, commits.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence and Playwright artifacts produced.
List remaining risks and any honestly-documented deviations (e.g., prose multi-cursor approach).

evidence: Implemented real backend-backed Monaco code intelligence bridge: app/src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.ts registers completion, hover, definition, references, formatting, code lens, inlay hints, stale markers, and stale diagnostics over app/src/lib/api.ts /knowledge/code/* and /api/diagnostics routes.

Implemented product mounting and navigation surfaces: app/src/lib/monaco/setup.ts enables minimap/stickyScroll/inlayHints and installs providers; app/src/components/MonacoCodeBlockView.tsx installs code-symbol editor actions and stale-marker refresh; app/src/App.tsx configures active workspace + opens code-symbol panel; app/src/components/CodeSymbolPanel.tsx loads symbol detail and target file lens.

Backend route/storage bridge: src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/knowledge_code_nav.rs accepts name/prefix/path lookup, src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/knowledge.rs pushes prefix filtering into bounded SQL, and src/backend/handshake_core/src/knowledge_code_index/monaco_bridge.rs exposes truncated file-lens payloads.

Runtime fixture/proof added: src/backend/handshake_core/src/bin/mt249_code_intelligence_fixture.rs seeds an isolated real-PostgreSQL code index through CodeIndexEngine, marks the indexed file stale, serves the real API routes, and tests/dependency_policy/mt249_code_intelligence.spec.ts drives app/harness/mt249-code-intelligence.html against that fixture.

Playwright runtime proof PASS: `pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.dependency.config.ts ../tests/dependency_policy/mt249_code_intelligence.spec.ts` from app/ passed 1/1; the proof exercised completion prefix lookup, hover documentation + marked_stale verdict, definition symbol lookup, references provider lookup, formatting, stale Monaco markers, diagnostics problem group, symbol detail, file lens, and diagnostics POST/list routes against the real fixture backend.

Frontend verification PASS: `pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed 5 tests; focused suite `pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/api.test.ts src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.test.ts src/components/MonacoCodeBlockView.language.test.tsx src/components/CodeSymbolPanel.test.tsx --reporter=dot` passed 4 files / 38 tests; `pnpm exec vitest run src/App.test.tsx -t "code symbol" --reporter=verbose` passed 1 targeted test.

Type/lint/build verification PASS: `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`; `pnpm exec eslint src/harness/mt249_code_intelligence_harness.tsx`; `pnpm exec eslint src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.ts src/components/CodeSymbolPanel.tsx`; `pnpm run build:harness`.

Backend verification PASS: `rustfmt --edition 2021 --check src\backend\handshake_core\src\bin\mt249_code_intelligence_fixture.rs`; `cargo test --manifest-path src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --features runtime-full,duckdb-flight-recorder,test-utils --target-dir D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake_Artifacts\handshake-cargo-target --test knowledge_code_nav_api_tests -- --nocapture` passed 2 tests; `cargo check --manifest-path src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --features runtime-full,duckdb-flight-recorder --target-dir D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake_Artifacts\handshake-cargo-target --bin mt249_code_intelligence_fixture` passed with existing warning noise only.
Mechanical hygiene PASS: `git diff --check` exited 0; output contained only existing CRLF-normalization warnings.

EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence: Playwright fixture used an isolated PostgreSQL schema, real migrations, real CodeIndexEngine source registration/indexing, real /knowledge/code/* route receipts, and /api/diagnostics problem-group persistence through the app state's diagnostics recorder. Literal dynamic receipt IDs were not persisted outside the runtime proof object.

DIFF_ATTACK_SURFACES: API/client producer-consumer drift between lookupCodeSymbols prefix query, knowledge_code_nav LookupParams, and Postgres lookup_code_symbols SQL filtering.
Monaco provider registration can appear installed while active workspace config remains null, causing silent no-op providers.
Reference-provider proof can pass direct API calls while not exercising Monaco's registered provider path.
Stale code-intelligence verdicts can be shown in hover/completion but fail to reach diagnostics/problems.
Fixture can fake the contract if it bypasses CodeIndexEngine or uses static suggestions instead of real /knowledge/code/* routes.
INDEPENDENT_CHECKS_RUN: `rg -n --no-heading "prefix|lookupCodeSymbols|lookup_code_symbols|HSK-CODE-INTEL-STALE|createDiagnostic" app/src/lib/api.ts app/src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.ts src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/knowledge_code_nav.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/knowledge.rs` confirmed prefix and stale-diagnostic propagation across client/provider/API/storage.
`pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.test.ts -t "does not query code navigation when no active workspace exists" --reporter=dot` PASS 1 test / 4 skipped.

`cargo check --manifest-path src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --features runtime-full,duckdb-flight-recorder --target-dir D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake_Artifacts\handshake-cargo-target --bin mt249_code_intelligence_fixture` PASS.
COUNTERFACTUAL_CHECKS: If app/src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.ts stopped calling lookupCodeSymbols with prefix in provideCompletionItems, the Playwright proof would lose the /knowledge/code/symbols?prefix=ad route and completion widget assertion.

If app/src/lib/monaco/code_intelligence.ts stopped calling getCodeSymbolReferences in provideReferences, the Playwright proof would lose the /knowledge/code/symbols/{symbol_entity_id}/references route.

If src/backend/handshake_core/src/bin/mt249_code_intelligence_fixture.rs bypassed CodeIndexEngine seeding, the fixture could not return the real indexed add symbol, file lens documentation, or marked_stale verdict from backend routes.
BOUNDARY_PROBES: Client/API/storage prefix boundary checked statically and by backend API test: frontend sends prefix=ad; API accepts prefix; storage pushes prefix through bounded SQL; API refines symbol/display prefix before serving.
Monaco/reference-provider boundary checked by the Playwright harness through Monaco's _executeReferenceProvider command service, not by a direct getCodeSymbolReferences API call.
Diagnostics writer/reader boundary checked by Playwright: stale marker refresh posts /api/diagnostics and waitForProblem reads /api/diagnostics/problems with code HSK-CODE-INTEL-STALE.
NEGATIVE_PATH_CHECKS: No-active-workspace provider path passed: completion provider returns no suggestions and does not call lookupCodeSymbols.
lookup_symbols rejects empty name/prefix/path with a bad request path; reviewed in src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/knowledge_code_nav.rs.
INDEPENDENT_FINDINGS: No blocking findings discovered for MT-249 first-submission readiness.
Non-blocking residual: the Playwright pass did not leave a retained passed-screenshot artifact under the checked artifact directories; runtime verdict and route assertions are the primary proof.

Non-blocking residual: Monaco references currently map returned reference ranges onto the active editor model URI; cross-file reference navigation may need a richer source-id to URI mapping in later hardening if references leave the current file.
Non-blocking residual: stale-marker diagnostics scan a bounded identifier set for UI performance; served hover/completion still carries staleness directly.
adversarial_review.RESIDUAL_UNCERTAINTY: The MT is ready for external validation, not marked PASS. Remaining uncertainty is limited to broader cross-file reference UX and full-WP dirty-worktree interactions outside MT-249; the core contract named in MT-249 is covered by real PostgreSQL, real backend routes, Monaco runtime proof, targeted unit tests, and independent boundary checks.

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger and/or offline Playwright where the contract names durable state or GUI behavior.
